name: Phrolova
profile:
A silent wave of her baton is enough to attune the very frequencies of being and conduct the symphonies of "souls." The music of hers can sculpt a better world or, just as easily, summon a legion to wreak havoc.{{Quote|The silent and somber Overseer of the Fractsidus, Phrolova carries an endless sadness that envelops everyone around her.
She weaves music that bridges the gap between life and death, crafting an ideal world within her heart.|Introduction from the Official Website.
